settingsClient.alertsDesc: Receive scan results in Slack or Discord

onboarding.welcomeSubtitle: Please review and accept our terms to continue
onboarding.termsAgree: I agree to the Terms of Service and Privacy Policy
onboarding.marketingAgree: I agree to receive product updates and security tips via email (optional)
onboarding.setupSubtitle: Configure repository access and automation features
onboarding.repoAccessDesc: Choose which repositories VEXLIT can access
onboarding.publicOnlyDesc: Scan only your public GitHub repositories
onboarding.allReposDesc: Include private repositories for comprehensive scanning
onboarding.automationDesc: Enable or disable features — you can change these later in Settings
onboarding.changeAnytime: You can change these settings anytime from the dashboard
onboarding.prCheckDesc: Automatically scan code when a pull request is created
onboarding.scheduledScanDesc: Run daily or weekly scans automatically
onboarding.securityAlertsDesc: Receive alerts in Slack, Discord, or email
onboarding.codeAnalysisDesc: AST-based vulnerability detection across your codebase

terms.codeAccessDesc: VEXLIT scans your code repositories for security vulnerabilities using static analysis. We access only the files and branches you explicitly authorize. Scan results are stored securely and associated with your account.
terms.dataProcessingDesc: Source code is processed in-memory during scanning and is not permanently stored beyond scan result metadata (file paths, line numbers, code snippets around vulnerabilities). Full source code is not retained after scan completion.
terms.aiDisclosureDesc: When you use AI-powered features (explanations, fix suggestions, reports), relevant code snippets may be sent to third-party AI providers (Anthropic) for processing. This data is not used for model training.
terms.retentionDesc: Scan results (vulnerability metadata, severity ratings, suggestions) are retained for the lifetime of your account. You may delete projects and associated scan data at any time.
terms.limitationsDesc: VEXLIT provides automated security scanning as a supplementary tool. It does not replace professional security audits. Results may contain false positives or miss certain vulnerability types.

privacy.infoCollectDesc: GitHub profile information (username, email, avatar), repository metadata (names, branches), and scan results. We do not sell your data to third parties.
privacy.howWeUseDesc: To provide security scanning services, display scan results, generate reports, and send notifications about new vulnerabilities found in your code.
privacy.thirdPartyDesc: We use Supabase (database/auth), Vercel (hosting), and Anthropic (AI features). Each service has their own privacy policy governing data they process.
